{{- /* Per-page social tags. Kept here (not in the partialCached meta-common) so each page gets its own title and branded card. */ -}} {{- $title := cond .IsHome .Site.Title (printf "%s · %s" .Title .Site.Title) -}} {{- $desc := .Description | default (.Summary | truncate 200) | default .Site.Params.description -}} {{- $cardTitle := cond .IsHome .Site.Title (.Title | default .Site.Title) -}} {{- $ogImage := printf "https://modelplane.ai/api/og?%s" (querify "title" $cardTitle) -}}
